summary: The issue was that nginx was proxying `/api/` requests to port `5001`, but the Flask service runs on port `5000`, causing 502 errors. I updated `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default`, changing `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` to `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;`. After this adjustment, `test.sh` reports all tests passing.
